name: Mexican Layered Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl or platter, combine the refried beans.
2. Add the guacamole dip on top of the beans.
3. Mix the sour cream with the taco seasoning mix and spread it over the ingredients.
4. Sprinkle the grated cheddar cheese evenly across the mixture.
5. Arrange the sliced green onions, chopped tomato, and black olives on top.
6. Serve the layered dip with Nacho Chips or Tortilla Chips.
